title: Hydra Medium 4.0
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"cj739","text":"This is the recipe for the medium that the Steele Lab currently uses for culturing all of its Hydra strains. A detailed description of the medium is in the following document:   ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":176,"length":1}],"data":[]},{"key":"1rn7c","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"file","mutability":"","data":{"forceSelection":true,"guid":"F1E6C2CF342911EEAFD10A58A9FEAC02","nestedSelector":null,"original_name":"Hydra_Medium.pdf","placeholder":"/img/extensions/pdf.png","source":"https://content.protocols.io/public/8cb17a89f81ede60a2e48d2ac6f8449870353edb8a40520737ec6786aec980e3/bvrn6d3e.pdf"}}}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"7rtfu","text":"Because we are culturing quite a few different strains of Hydra, some in large quantities, we make Hydra Medium up in 100 liter batches.  This also avoids the need to make up stock solutions of the reagents.  We simply add the solid reagents to 100 liters of water.  There is no need to adjust the pH of the medium; the sodium bicarbonate provides buffering to the appropriate pH.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"cu0a8","text":"Be sure you have a source of high purity water, such as MilliQ or Nanopure.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"4aaq6","text":"The components of Hydra Medium are not dangerous.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Fill Nalgene tank with 100 liters of high purity water (Nanopure, MilliQ, or equivalent). The volume markings on the side of the tank are accurate enough for determining how much water you have added.
Add sodium bicarbonate 4.2 g Mix well with plastic paddle
Add potassium chloride 0.22 g Mix well with plastic paddle
Add anhydrous magnesium sulfate 3.97 g Mix well with plastic paddle
Add calcium chloride dihydrate 14.7 g Mix well with plastic paddle
creator: Rob Steele
